titleStmt.title: SII 20.151: original edition by G. S. Gai
No. 151. (B.K. No. 37 of 1936-37.) KAḌLĒVĀḌ, SINDGI TALUK, BIJAPUR DISTRICT.

p.hi: Slab lying in the Temple of Svāmiliṅga.

summary.p: This record is dated in Śaka 1090, Sarvadhāri, Āśvija, śu. Pūrṇimā, Wednesday, lunar eclipse, corresponding to A.D. 1168, September 18, Wednesday, f.d.t. ·03.

The inscription states that Mahāmaṇḍalēśvara Simgidēvarasa of the Silāhāra family who was governing Eḷamēlu, made a grant of certain taxes and incomes due from Seṁbevāḍa under the administration of the temple of Svayaṁbhū Sōmanāthadēva of Kaḍalevāḍa for the benefit of the same temple. The gift was entrusted to āchārya Sōvarāśidēva. It also registers another gift of one gadyāṇa from each of the villages in the nāḍu by Mahāmaṇḍalēśvara Gōmadēvarasa. ēteya-nāyaka of Haḍavaḷahaṭṭi and the prabhus and gāvuṇḍas of Eḷamēla-30 and Siṁdige-12, for the benefit of the same temple. The king is stated to have been ruling from Maṁgaḷivēḍa.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
© śrī Ōṁ namaḥ śivāya(ḥ) . namastuṁgaśirastuṁbicaṁdracāmaracāravē trai
ḷōkyanagarāraṁbhamūlastaṁbhāya śaṁbhavē svasti samasta
bhuvanāśrayaṁ śrīprithvīvallabhaṁ mahārājādhirājaṁ paramēśvaraṁ kāḷāṁ
jaravuravarādhīśvaraṁ suvarṇnavriṣabhadhvajaṁ ḍamarugatūryyanirgghōśa
ṇaṁ kaḻacuryyakuḻakamaḻamārttaṇḍa kadanapracaṇḍa subhaṭarāditya kaligaḻaṁ
kusaṁ caladaṁkarāmaṁ śrīmatkaḻacuryyacakravartti rāyamurāri bhuja
baḻamalla sōyidēvara vijayarājyamuttarōttarābhivṛddhipravarddhamāna
mācaṁdrārkkatāraṁ saluttamire maṁgaḷivēḍada nelevīḍinoḷsukhasaṁkadhāvinō
dadiṁ rājyaṁgeyyuttamire tatpādapadmōpajīvi . © svasti samadhigatapañcamahā
śabda mahāmaṇḍaḷēśvaraṁ tagaranagarādhīśvaraṁ jīmūtavāhanānvayaprasū
taṁ sauryyaraghujātaṁ rājamāndhātaṁ śrī śiḷāṟavaṁśōdbhavaṁ vibhavāma
rēṁdraṁ ḍaṁgāṟabhērīnirgghōśaṇaṁ samaraykabhīṣaṇaṁ vidagdhamugdhagaṇa hriThe correct reading should bemugtha gaṇikā.
dayakusmakōdaṁḍa kadanapracaṁḍa ceṁnamaṁneyapaṁnegavainatēyaṁ virōdhima
ṁneyatārakāsurakārttikēyanativiśamahayārūḍhaprauḍharēkhārēvantaṁ
vijayalakṣmīkāntaṁ suvarṇnagaruḍadhvajaṁ vimaḷakīrttidhvajaṁ kātyāyanīdēvī
labdhavaraprasāda sahajamṛgamadāmōda sauryyamaṁ meṟeva baṁṭa
ra bāvaṁ maṟevuge kāvaṁ sōmanaṁkakāṟaṁ raṇaraṁganīṟaṁ nijada beḍaṁgaṁ śrīmadu
ttarēśvaradēvara divyaśrīpādārādhakaṁ parabaḻasādhakaṁ nāmādi samastaprasasti
(sti)sahitaṁ śrīmanmahāma(ṁ)ṇḍaḷēśvaraṁ siṁgidēvarasar Eḷamēlalu sukha saṁkathāvi
nōdadiṁ rājyaṁgeyyuttirddu © svasti saka nripakālavarṣa 1090 neya sarvvadhāri saThe letters saka are written above the line.
ṁvatsarada Āśvija suddha puṇnami vaḍḍavāra sōmagrahaṇadaṁdu kaḍalevāḍada
śrī svayaṁbhusōmanāthadēvarāḷkeya seṁbevāḍada manneyamumaṁ prabhutvada
dasavaṁda hiṭṭu mūligararuvaṇa hiṭṭudeṟe Aṣṭabhōga tējasāmya ka
ṇike kiṟukuḷāyadāyavintinitumaṁ sarvvanamasyavāgi śrī svayaṁbhu sō
manāthadēvara Aṁgaraṁgabhōgakkeṁdu Ācāryya sōvarāsidēvargge kālaṁ karcci dhārā
pūrvvakaṁ māḍi yācaṁdrārkkatāraṁ saluvantāgi koṭṭaru © madvaṁśajāḥ parama
hīpativaṁśajā vā pāpādapētamanasā bhuvi bhūmibhūpā tē pālayantu
mama dharmmamidaṁ samastaṁ tēṣāṁ mayā viracitāṁjalirēṣa mūrdhni . svadattāṁ
paradattāṁ vvā yō harēti vasuṁdharā ṣaṣṭirvvarṣasahasrāṇi viṣṭhāyāṁ jāyatē
krimi . maṁgaḷamahā śrī śrī © svasti samastaprasastisahitaṁ śrīmanma
hāmaṁḍaḷēsvaraṁ gōmadēvarasaruṁ haḍavaḷahaṭṭiya kēteyanāyakanuṁ Eḷamēlu mūvattaṟa siṁdi
ge haṁneraḍaṟa prabhu gāvuṁḍugaḷu taṁmmoḷēkastarāgi kaḍalevāḍada śrī svayaṁbhu sōmanā
thadēvara Aṁgaraṁgabhōgakkeṁdu nāḍoḷage grāmānugrāmadalu gadyāṇavoṁdaṁ dēva
rgge Ācaṁdrārkkatāraṁbaraṁ naḍuvaṁtāgi dhārāpūrvvakaṁ māḍi koṭṭaru . ©
Digital edition of SII 20.151 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
